shell.subtitle: Dieu phoi workflow AI trong mot ung dung gon nhe duy nhat.
shell.footerTagline: Flutter shell phase 1 duoc port theo app Next.js tham chieu.

home.headline: Tao, dieu phoi va dua san pham ra ngoai trong mot noi.
home.lead: Be mat discovery public mobile-first cho Flutter lay cam hung tu app Next.js. Bao gom banner that, posted images that va app shell thong nhat.
home.feedMissingPreview: Post nay hien chua co preview prompt hoac caption.
home.configBody: Home nay doc banner va public post du lieu that tu Supabase. Hay cung cap SUPABASE_URL va SUPABASE_ANON_KEY cho ban build nay.
home.errorBody: Ung dung chua the lay banner hoac public post luc nay. Thu lai sau it phut.
home.emptyBody: Hien khong co active banner nao hoac posted image nao de hien thi.
home.linkUnavailable: Dich den nay chua san sang ben trong Flutter app.
home.linkError: Khong mo duoc link banner da chon.
home.followingEmptyTitle: Chua co creator dang theo doi
home.followingEmptyBody: Muc Following hien dang dung bo loc tam thoi o local. Khi co them creator de tuong tac, muc nay se ro rang hon.

coordinate.title: Coordinate workspace
coordinate.description: Khu vuc protected nay se chua collaboration lane, initiative tracking va cac man hinh execution dung chung.
coordinate.boardSubtitle: Xem cac coordinate generation moi nhat cua ban tu Supabase trong mot board owner-facing.
coordinate.summaryTitle: Thu vien coordinate moi nhat cua ban
coordinate.missingPrompt: Item nay khong co prompt da luu.
coordinate.emptyBody: Hay generate hoac dong bo coordinate output dau tien len Supabase, roi quay lai day de quan ly.
coordinate.errorBody: Board chua the lay du lieu moi nhat luc nay. Thu lai sau it phut.
coordinate.configBody: Board nay doc du lieu that tu Supabase. Hay cung cap SUPABASE_URL va SUPABASE_ANON_KEY cho ban build nay.

challenge.title: Challenge board
challenge.description: Trang protected nay danh cho challenge campaign, bai nop va cac checkpoint tien do.

notifications.title: Notifications center
notifications.description: Section nay se gom alert, event update va collaboration signal vao mot man hinh mobile-first.

myPage.title: My page
myPage.description: Khu vuc profile protected nay se hien thong tin tai khoan, creator identity va tom tat hoat dong.
